title: Is there any way to get list of comments (notes) for board item via Graph QL?
excerpt:
I cannot find a way to get comments (notes) of board items. Boards query doesn’t contain any info about it. 
https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/boards 
Is there any way to do that?

posts.author: snb (Sergey Batishchev)
posts.cookedHtml:
I cannot find a way to get comments (notes) of board items. Boards query doesn’t contain any info about it.
https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/boards
Is there any way to do that?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @snb

Welcome to the community. Are you looking for the board comments (on top of board below title) or are you referring to the item updates, the on that open when you click an item title. The last one (called updates) can be retrieved as documented here.

posts.author: snb (Sergey Batishchev)
posts.cookedHtml: I mean comments right to item name.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @snb
Those are “updates” and you can find them in the link provided by @basdebruin

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @snb!

Welcome to the community! I hope you like it here

Thank you @basdebruin for that useful information!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
